6.reason: [Use of unsafe function 'gets' which is deprecated and may cause buffer overflow; also, in some environments like newer C standards or certain compilers, 'gets' is removed entirely causing compilation error]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Use of unsafe function 'gets' which is deprecated and may cause buffer overflow; also, in some environments like newer C standards or certain compilers, 'gets' is removed entirely causing compilation error]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; many modern compilers (like GCC) no longer support it, leading to a compilation error.]
